blocks.text: Got everything your team sent over, and there is nothing outstanding on your side for the moment. Amy Carter is drafting the first cut of the core messages for the {{fact:f:E-2023-001.client}} leadership voice against those inputs, and I would rather she land it right than land it fast, so look for a version worth your time early next week.

One thing that would help now: point me to anyone besides you who needs to read language before it goes out. If we know that from the first draft we route it correctly instead of circling back, and if it is only you for the moment, tell me and we keep the loop tight.
